resources.string: Required to lock/unlock camera based on location.
Camera permission is required to scan QR codes
Camera is currently unlocked and available for use.
Camera is currently locked for security.
Instantly blocks camera apps while you are inside a restricted facility.
CamBlock uses the Accessibility Service only to detect when a camera app opens and immediately block it. It does NOT read window content, type, or record anything.
Required to instantly block camera apps the moment they open.

CamBlock needs the Accessibility Service enabled so it can detect when a camera app comes to the foreground and immediately close it while you are inside a restricted facility.\n\nIt does NOT read your screen, record keystrokes, or collect any personal data.
